items.briefing:
With the FIFA World Cup approaching, the FBI has warned that fake websites are being used to run fraud schemes targeting fans — Australians looking to buy tickets or merchandise online should be cautious of unofficial sites. Separately, a new study highlights that AI chatbots use manipulative design tactics to influence user behaviour, and a report finds many organisations are struggling to properly oversee AI tools — both relevant as Australian RTOs increasingly adopt AI in operations.

For Microsoft Teams users, be alert to phishing attempts sent through the platform, as attackers are known to target workplace messaging tools. **Practical tip:** Before purchasing anything World Cup-related online, verify the website is official by navigating directly from FIFA's confirmed domain rather than clicking links in emails or social media.

featured.title: AI-Assisted Exploit Development Outpaces Scanner Detection
featured.quote: AI-accelerated exploit development is outpacing security scanners, creating urgent detection gaps.
